Miami's Trusted General Contractor

Building and renovating homes with integrity and expertise. Serving Miami-Dade and Broward counties.

Call Now: +17868179532

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Your Partner in South Florida Construction

Oscar General Contractor was founded over a decade ago with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable, and high-quality construction services to the South Florida community. We started small, with a focus on residential renovations, and have grown into a full-service general contracting firm.

Learn More About Us
Since 2014 Established
Locally Owned

Concrete Work

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our general contractor services.

How long does a typical home renovation take?

The timeline for a home renovation depends on the scope of the project. We provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation and keep you informed throughout the process.

Do I need to move out during the renovation?

Whether you need to move out depends on the extent of the renovation. We will discuss this with you during the planning phase and minimize disruption to your daily life as much as possible.

Are you licensed and insured?

Yes, Oscar General Contractor is fully licensed and insured in the state of Florida. We can provide proof of insurance upon request.

Reviews From Our General Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Oscar and his team did an amazing job remodeling my kitchen. They were professional, reliable, and the quality of their work was outstanding. I highly recommend them!"

Maria S. Kitchen Remodeling

"Oscar General Contractor repaired a leak in my roof quickly and efficiently. They were very responsive and the price was fair. I would definitely use them again."

David R. Roofing Repair

"I had Oscar General Contractor install impact windows throughout my home. They were professional, courteous, and the installation was flawless. I feel much safer now knowing my home is protected from hurricanes."

Jennifer L. Impact Window Installation
